mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id , c.post_id , c.user_id , c.content , c.created_at , c.updated_at , u.name AS writer_name FROM comments c JOIN user_account u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.comment_id ASC

SELECT c.comment_id , c.post_id , c.user_id , c.content , c.created_at , c.updated_at , u.name AS writer_name FROM comments c JOIN user_account u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments ( comment_id, post_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( seq_comments.NEXTVAL, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
